mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real retail sales signals robust consumer spending, which drives corporate earnings and lifts equity prices over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Rank IC of RSAFS growth vs 20-day forward returns < 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive returns in top decile of retail sales growth are not significantly different from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the consumer price index above 218 signals persistent inflation, prompting the Fed to tighten policy, which reduces equity valuations and produces negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day returns occur in less than 55% of trigger instances, or the hit rate is not statistically above 50% at the 5% level.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously falling unemployment and rising retail sales indicate a self-reinforcing expansion in labor income and consumption, amplifying positive equity returns beyond the sum of individual effects.
failure_condition: The joint signal (UNRATE decline & RSAFS rise) fails to produce a mean 20-day return higher than the single-proxy baselines by at least 100 bps over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During the post-recession recovery, rising housing starts lead residential investment and consumer confidence, boosting equity markets over a quarter ahead as construction activity multiplies.
failure_condition: HOUST growth in recovery periods shows a negative correlation with 60-day forward returns, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production directly reflects rising aggregate output and capacity utilization, forecasting higher corporate earnings and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The correlation between INDPRO monthly change and 20-day SPX returns is not significantly positive (p > 0.05) over any 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in the unemployment rate below 6% signals the labor market has largely healed from the recession, boosting consumer sentiment and equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Average 60-day forward return after trigger is not positive and significantly different from zero (t-test p < 0.10), or hit rate ≤ 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Ultra-low interest rates combined with accelerating retail sales indicate that monetary accommodation is effectively stimulating demand, creating a powerful tailwind for equities over the next month.
failure_condition: The composite interaction signal (low FEDFUNDS & rising RSAFS) does not yield a positive mean 20-day return above 0.5% across all instances in the walk-forward period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in housing starts below 500,000 units signals a deepening contraction in residential investment, depressing household wealth and forward equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Less than 60% of trigger occurrences are followed by negative 20-day returns, or the average negative return is not statistically below zero at the 10% level.
